normalizationRules.greenMeansSuccess: Workflow completed successfully with all checks passing
normalizationRules.yellowMeansWarning: Workflow completed but with non-blocking warnings (external dependencies unavailable, optional checks skipped)
normalizationRules.redMeansFailure: Workflow failed due to code/configuration issues that require human intervention
normalizationRules.skipBehavior: Workflows should skip gracefully (exit 0) when not applicable, with clear message in summary
principles: A green result should ALWAYS mean the workflow did what it was supposed to do
Failures from external dependencies should warn, not fail (unless critical)
Path filters should prevent workflows from running on irrelevant changes
Scheduled workflows should be resilient to transient infrastructure issues
Manual workflows may fail on external dependencies (operator can retry)

ci-cd.purpose: Build, test, and deploy application code

infrastructure.sla: < 15 minutes for plan, < 30 minutes for apply
